description_long: This object is a sleek, modern fighter jet painted in a striking blue color with yellow accents along the edges of the wings, tail, and fuselage. The jet features a streamlined nose, a clear enclosed cockpit canopy, and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. Its wings are sharply swept back and equipped with small winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic performance. The rear of the jet houses two prominent jet engine exhausts, indicating a powerful propulsion system. The overall design is reminiscent of high-performance military aircraft, optimized for speed and agility.
description: A blue and yellow modern fighter jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a clear cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated nose, cockpit canopy, swept-back wings, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin jet engine exhausts, vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan with yellow-tipped winglets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit and aerodynamic fuselage.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full wing configuration, yellow accents, and the streamlined fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and small upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
